{{Infobox character
| name = Ozriel (Cradle)
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|authority over Ozriel’s Scythe}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, conjure a black sword}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Reaper|the Reaper]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, [[Abidan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Jai Patriarch|Patriarch]], [[judge|Judge]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Spider of the Abidan|the Spider]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, eighth Judge, the eighth Judge}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Reaper of Worlds]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Abidan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, Hound's side}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Arelius family]], Court of Seven}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Reaper]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, craftsman, [[judge|Judge]], [[Void Sage]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Ozriel (Cradle) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel, also known as the [[Reaper]], is a central figure within the [[Abidan Court]] and is recognized as their founder. He once served as a [[Judge]], holding authority over six of the seven [[Abidan]] Divisions, including the [[Titans]]. During his tenure, he acted as a celestial executioner, using a unique Scythe to dispose of corrupted worlds without leaving behind toxic residue. This ability allowed the [[Abidan]] to expand by stitching together healthy fragments of reality into new [[Iterations]]. Despite his role in maintaining order, Ozriel eventually abandoned his position because he refused to carry out the mass destruction of condemned worlds. Ozriel is characterized by a complex personality, often masking deep sadness or lingering anger with humor and an animated demeanor. He is highly skilled in manipulating [[fate]], a talent he used to hide his departure from the [[Court]]. Before leaving, he took several measures to protect his legacy and minimize the damage of his absence, including establishing sixteen population shelters to preserve genetics and cultures from doomed worlds. He also left behind a beacon in the world of [[Cradle]]—his own birthplace—as an invitation for talented descendants to join him. While his departure caused significant instability within the [[Abidan]], he remains a powerful entity capable of immense feats, such as creating specialized weaponry and influencing the destiny of various [[Iterations]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Ozriel is a being who would try to save everyone but fail.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] was sent to hunt for Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Ozriel's designation is zero-zero-eight.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Ozriel is gone.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Ozriel is known as the [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|As an [[Abidan]], Ozriel is a white-haired warrior who wears the [[Mantle of Ozriel]] alongside polished black armor. He has identified sixteen specific worlds that are destined to fall into corruption during his absence. To protect his people, [[Suriel]] relocated Ozriel's population to [[Pioneer 8089]]. Furthermore, he possesses the unique ability to dispose of a corrupted world without causing it to shatter into toxic pieces.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Ozriel is an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Ozriel wears polished black armor and the [[Mantle of Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Ozriel has white hair.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Ozriel identified sixteen worlds that will be corrupted during his absence.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]] sent Ozriel's population to [[Pioneer 8089]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Ozriel is a person capable of disposing of a corrupted world without breaking it into toxic pieces.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Once an ally of the [[Hound]], Ozriel's death is a subject of scrutiny as [[Makiel]] requests [[Suriel]] to confirm his passing, leading to speculation that his demise may have been staged. He is a man characterized by long streaming white hair, pure blue eyes, and a pale, angular face. As a descendant of those he once left behind, Ozriel possesses children who have inherited his unique sight. His current ambitions involve planting seeds within dying worlds to cultivate individuals who exist outside the constraints of the [[Abidan]], a process aided by armor that can billow a mantle of darkness.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] asks [[Suriel]] to verify if Ozriel is dead.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel's death may have been staged.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel was once part of the [[Hound]]'s side.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel is a man with pale skin, long angular face, pure blue eyes, and long streaming white hair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel is a descendant of those he left behind.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel's plan involves planting seeds in dying worlds to raise people outside the rules of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel's armor can billow a mantle of darkness.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Ozriel claims to have children who inherited his sight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The scythes used by [[Makiel]] are not creations of Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ozriel is a being that can match [[Makiel]] in combat.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ozriel is an [[Abidan]] who wears black armor and has white hair.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ozriel's meddling changed things for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ozriel possesses a marble that shows projections.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ozriel's departure reduced the number of [[Abidan]] worlds.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Originally known as [[Ozmanthus]], the founder of the [[Arelius family]] ascended to become the [[Abidan]] [[Judge]] named Ozriel. As a [[Void Sage]] and an irreplaceable asset to the [[Abidan]], he was associated with the [[Court of Seven]] and appeared to be an ally to [[Suriel]]. Though he eventually left the [[Court]], Ozriel remains a legendary figure whose presence is felt through memories scattered across the [[Iteration]] and a beacon left within [[Cradle]]. A master craftsman who once emphasized the use of a hammer, he is known for his [[scythe]] crest and his ability to perfectly eliminate entire worlds when he reaps them. Even after his departure, his legacy persists through treasures left behind, a remaining dream tablet, and the authorized use of Personal Record 3349.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">26</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is a person who possesses a Scythe.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is the new name granted to [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is the founder of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel ascended to become the [[Abidan]] known as Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel seemed to be an ally to [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel's crest is a [[scythe]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Any hint left behind by Ozriel could be a treasure.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is an authorized user of Personal Record 3349.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|When Ozriel reaps a world, he eliminates it perfectly from existence.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel was bound by the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel was the [[Arelius family]] Patriarch and once owned this room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel left the [[Court]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel left memories all over the [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel emphasized the use of a hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel had a remaining dream tablet.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel has a crest.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is an [[Abidan]] who left a beacon in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is addressed by [[Daruman]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is the greatest craftsman [[Cradle]] has ever produced.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is a [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] uses an authorization code 'zero-zero-eight' associated with Ozriel to release authority and remove restraints.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel has authority over [[Ozriel’s Scythe]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is associated with the [[Court of Seven]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] had cried as Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ozriel is described as an irreplaceable asset to the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Known as the [[Spider]], Ozriel is a [[Mantle]]-wielder whose workshops and foundries are marked by his unique [[scythe]] signature. During an unexpected arrival, he appeared alongside [[Suriel]] wearing black armor and a black gauntlet, though his hands were manacled and he did not carry his [[scythe]]. While [[Suriel]] can command him to intervene in various conflicts, Ozriel is a figure who has stood trial and could face execution by the [[Abidan]] for his crimes. Despite this, he possesses a body that has been perfected both genetically and conceptually, allowing him access to the private [[Abidan network]] for education or entertainment.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel possesses a [[Mantle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel is referred to as the [[Spider]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel's workshops and foundries are marked with his [[scythe]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel is a character who travels with [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel has manacled hands.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel wears black armor and has white hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel arrived unexpectedly and can make a significant entrance.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel does not have his Scythe with him during this event.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel has a black gauntlet.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel has a unique signature.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel is a character who can be commanded by [[Suriel]] to intervene in conflicts.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel is a figure the [[Abidan]] might execute for his crimes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel has stood trial.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel can access the private [[Abidan network]] for entertainment or education.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ozriel's body has been perfected both genetically and conceptually.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The eighth [[Judge]], Ozriel, is a being who was once the strongest in any given world and possesses authority that can radiate into the [[Way]]. After breaking a black marble to reveal his true identity, he reached out for his [[Scythe of Ozriel]], a weapon forged from a slice of darkness that he had previously hidden beneath the ice of [[Makiel]]'s home. During his combat against [[the Mad King]]'s true self, he demonstrated the ability to conjure a black [[sword]], a strike that [[Yerin]] eventually learned to imitate. Though he once vanished without leaving any dust or echo, he later reappeared within a column of sapphire flames. As a [[Judge]] previously considered non-objective regarding the [[Executor program]], he is expected to interrupt [[Suriel]] and [[Lindon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel's authority can radiate into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel can conjure a black [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] revealed himself as Ozriel after breaking his black marble.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel reached out for his Scythe when faced with destruction.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel buried a weapon beneath the ice in the center of the [[Hound]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel's weapon is the [[Scythe of Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Scythe of Ozriel]] is described as a slice of darkness forged into metal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozriel's Scythe]] was hidden beneath [[Makiel]]'s home.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel is fighting [[the Mad King]]'s true self.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] suggests [[Yerin]]'s feelings might be influenced by Ozriel or [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel is a being who was once the strongest in any given world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel is the creator of the [[Reaper]]'s Scythe.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] learned to imitate Ozriel’s [[sword]] strike.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel vanished and left behind no dust or echo.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel reappeared in a column of sapphire flames.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel is a [[Judge]] who was considered not objective in the matter of the [[Executor program]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel is the eighth [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ozriel is expected to interrupt [[Suriel]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Known as the [[Reaper of Worlds]], Ozriel is a white-haired member of the [[Court of Seven]] who was once an [[Abidan]] [[Judge]] compatible with six of the seven disciplines, including the [[Titans]]. Although he is a skilled weapon maker who crafted [[Mercy]]'s bow, he abandoned his divine responsibilities and post, leading [[Cirian]] to view him as a traitor. After recruiting the first generation of Reapers, he sent a baby [[Reaper]] to [[Threshold]] to serve as an assassin for the Silverlord. Now acting as a [[Reaper]] himself, Ozriel uses a [[scythe]] that he has hidden under [[Abidan]] control and waited for the [[Judges]] to arrive following the departure of [[the Mad King]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel was a [[Judge]] who was compatible with only six of the seven disciplines.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is a [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel crafted [[Mercy]]'s bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel was once qualified as the [[Judge]] for six out of the seven [[Abidan]] Divisions, including the [[Titans]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel sent a baby [[Reaper]] to [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is considered a traitor by [[Cirian]] for abandoning his divine responsibilities.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel has hidden his Scythe under [[Abidan]] control.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel prepared the [[Reaper]] as an assassin for the Silverlord.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is a figure who recruited the first generation of Reapers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is known as the [[Reaper of Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is delighted with [[Cirian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel abandoned his post.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is a [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel has white hair.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel is a member of the [[Court of Seven]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel uses a Scythe.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel makes weapons.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ozriel waited for the [[Judges]] to arrive after [[the Mad King]] was driven away.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Suriel,” he said, and his voice resonated through the room. “Will you verify for the record that Ozriel is dead?”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“To encourage us to look for a replacement,” she said, “He has left us in a scenario where we have no choice but to act as though he is dead.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“If you have found this, that means you are one of the descendants I’ve left behind.”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“You are one of my children,” he said. “You have inherited my my sight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“You hide as I do, Ozriel. Let us go our separate ways.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
